cose.institutional.p1: WECOOP is an integrated model of social and work inclusion that combines local services, personalised support and a digital platform to facilitate access to rights, services and opportunities.
cose.institutional.p2: The project is aimed in particular at migrant citizens and people in vulnerable situations, supporting them in managing administrative and tax procedures, developing skills, accessing work and pursuing economic autonomy.
cose.institutional.p3: Through a structured and scalable approach, WECOOP connects territories, institutions and private partners, generating measurable social impact and promoting active inclusion.
cose.institutional.title: An integrated model of inclusion

servizi.hero.title: WECOOP services for living, working and growing in Italy
servizi.hero.subtitle: Practical support for documents, work, taxation and credit access. We guide you step by step with an integrated physical and digital service.
servizi.hero.microcopy: We respond quickly and help you figure out where to start, step by step.
servizi.intro.title: How we can help
servizi.intro.body: WECOOP is a single access point for essential services for life in Italy. Whether you need to manage documents, find a job, start a business or access credit, we guide and support you at every stage.
servizi.grid.title: All WECOOP services
servizi.s1.title: Living in Italy
servizi.s1.desc: Practical support to navigate daily and administrative life in Italy.
servizi.s2.title: Tax services
servizi.s2.desc: Mediation and support to understand and manage tax obligations and returns.
servizi.s3.title: VAT number
servizi.s3.desc: Complete support to start and manage a business under the flat-rate scheme.
servizi.s4.title: Work and guidance
servizi.s4.desc: We help you understand how to navigate the job market and build your career path.
servizi.s5.title: Finance and credit access
servizi.s5.desc: Financial education and guidance to access credit instruments in an informed way.
servizi.s6.title: Study in Italy
servizi.s6.desc: Guidance to access training and educational pathways in Italy.
servizi.model.title: One integrated path, not separate services
servizi.model.body: WECOOP does not offer isolated services, but an integrated path. We start from your needs and guide you through documents, work, training and access to services.
servizi.cta.title: Do you need support?
servizi.cta.body: Contact us and we will help you figure out where to start.
contact.hero.title: Contact us
contact.hero.subtitle: We are here to help you. Contact us for support on WECOOP services or to build new collaborations.
contact.hero.microcopy: We reply quickly and help you understand where to start.
contact.info.title: How to contact us
contact.info.lead: Come visit us at our office or contact us through your preferred channel.

contact.info.hours.label: Hours

model.hero.title: The WECOOP journey, step by step
model.hero.subtitle: We listen, guide and support you toward work and independence. A simple, concrete and human path.
model.hero.microcopy: We reply quickly and help you understand where to start.
model.percorso.title: How we help you
model.percorso.lead: Six concrete steps to take you from listening to employment.
model.step1.title: 1. We listen to you
model.step1.body: We understand your situation, needs and expectations without judgment.
model.step2.title: 2. We guide you
model.step2.body: We explain the options, rights and paths available for your situation.
model.step3.title: 3. We help you
model.step3.body: We support you with documents, bureaucratic procedures, services and tools.
model.step4.title: 4. We train you
model.step4.body: You develop practical and digital skills useful for the Italian job market.
model.step5.title: 5. We guide you into work
model.step5.body: We help you apply, prepare for interviews and find real opportunities.
model.step6.title: 6. We support you long-term
model.step6.body: We stay close even after your first job placement to help you grow.
model.dopo.title: What happens after the first meeting
model.dopo.body: After the first interview, we build a personalized plan together. No two journeys are the same.
model.dopo.item1: You receive a personalized support plan
model.dopo.item2: You are followed by a dedicated operator
model.dopo.item3: You get access to the WECOOP digital platform
model.dopo.item4: You can come back at any time for new needs
model.dopo.quote: It does not matter where you start: what matters is that you are not alone.
model.accesso.title: One single access point for everything
model.accesso.lead: With WECOOP you do not have to search for multiple offices. Here you find everything you need.
model.phygital.title: Physical and digital, always
model.phygital.lead: You can meet us in person or use the digital platform: support is always available.
model.phygital.physical.title: Physical office
model.phygital.digital.title: Digital platform
model.phygital.digital.item4: Stay in touch with your operator
model.cta.title: Start your journey with WECOOP
model.cta.lead: The first step is the most important. Contact us today, no commitment.
model.cta.microcopy: We reply quickly and help you understand where to start, step by step.
frontpage.how.microcopy: We explain the journey step by step.
passaparola.hero.title: Passaparola – WECOOP community project
passaparola.hero.subtitle: The community project by WECOOP connecting people, services and opportunities.
passaparola.hero.strategic: Passaparola is the physical access point to the WECOOP model on the territory.
passaparola.cose.title: What is Passaparola
passaparola.cose.p1: Passaparola is the project through which WECOOP operates directly on the territory, offering guidance, support and accompaniment to people.
passaparola.cose.p2: It represents the physical access point to the WECOOP model, where people can receive concrete help to address administrative, work and personal needs.
passaparola.cards.title: Problem and solution
passaparola.cards.problema.title: The problem
passaparola.cards.problema.body: Difficulty accessing services and opportunities for migrants and vulnerable people.
passaparola.cards.soluzione.title: The solution
passaparola.cards.soluzione.body: An integrated system combining guidance, training and access to services.
passaparola.cards.attivita.title: Activities
passaparola.cards.attivita.body: Guidance, training and support for work, services and autonomy.
passaparola.cards.impatto.title: Impact
passaparola.cards.impatto.body: Real inclusion, personal autonomy and concrete access to opportunities.
passaparola.whatwedo.title: What we do in practice
passaparola.model.title: An integrated project within the WECOOP model
passaparola.model.p1: Passaparola is the community component of the WECOOP model. It works in connection with WECOOP services, the digital platform and partners on the territory.
passaparola.model.p2: Enabling us to build a complete, continuous and accessible journey for all people who need it.
passaparola.impact.title: Social impact
passaparola.target.title: Who it is for
passaparola.target.item5: Those who want to build autonomy
passaparola.cta.title: Do you want to participate or collaborate?
passaparola.cta.body: Contact us to access services or to build new opportunities together.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.hero.desc: Information about cookies and tracking technologies used on this site.
legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.hero.desc: Legal information, intellectual property and liability.
pp.s1.title: 1. Data Controller
pp.s2.title: 2. Types of Data Collected
pp.s2.p1: Personal Data collected includes: name, phone number, email address, usage data, Cookies and various types of data.
pp.s2.p2: Personal Data may be freely provided by the User or collected automatically during use of the Application.
pp.s3.title: 3. Purposes of Processing
pp.s3.li1b: managing support requests, platform access, enrollment in WeCoop programs.
pp.s3.li2b: sending newsletters and updates (with prior consent).
pp.s3.li3b: improving the platform using anonymous and aggregated data.
pp.s3.li4b: compliance with legal or contractual obligations.
pp.s4.title: 4. Legal Basis for Processing
pp.s4.p1: Processing is based on: (a) consent; (b) contract performance; (c) legitimate interest; (d) legal obligation, pursuant to Art. 6 GDPR.
pp.s5.title: 5. Data Recipients
pp.s5.p1: Personal Data is not sold. It may be shared with technical providers, institutional partners, and competent authorities.
pp.s6.title: 6. Data Transfers
pp.s6.p1: Data is processed mainly in Italy and the EU. Extra-EU transfers comply with GDPR safeguards (Arts. 46-49).
pp.s7.title: 7. Retention Period
pp.s7.p1: Contact data until consent withdrawal; accounting data 10 years; technical logs 12 months.
pp.s8.title: 8. Rights of the Data Subject
pp.s8.p1: Under Arts. 15-22 GDPR, the User has the right to:
pp.s8.li6: Lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority
pp.s9.title: 9. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
pp.s9.p1: WeCoop uses Cookies and similar technologies. For detailed information, please read our
pp.s10.title: 10. Minors
pp.s10.p1: WeCoop services are not intended for users under 16. Contact us immediately if you detect unintentional collection.
pp.s11.title: 11. Changes to the Privacy Policy
pp.s11.p1: The Controller may update this policy. We recommend checking this page regularly.
cp.s1.title: What Are Cookies?
cp.s1.p1: Cookies are small text files saved in the browser to improve browsing experience.
cp.s2.title: Types of Cookies Used
cp.s2a.title: Technical Cookies (Strictly Necessary)
cp.s2a.p1: Required for site operation. No consent needed.
cp.s2b.title: Analytical Cookies
cp.s2b.p1: Used to analyse traffic and user behaviour. Activated only with consent.
cp.s2c.title: Marketing and Tracking Cookies
cp.s2c.p1: Used to display relevant ads. Activated only with explicit consent.
cp.table.name: Name
cp.s3.title: How to Manage Cookies
cp.s3.p1: Manage your preferences via the cookie panel in the footer or by configuring your browser:
cp.s3.p2: Disabling some Cookies may impair site features.
cp.s4.title: Third-Party Cookies
cp.s4.p1: Some Cookies are set by third parties. Consult their privacy policies:
cp.s5.title: Changes to the Cookie Policy
cp.s5.p1: WeCoop may update this policy. Changes take effect from publication.
nl.s1.title: Company Information
nl.s2.title: Intellectual Property
nl.s2.p1: All content on this site is owned by WeCoop or its authors and protected by intellectual property law.
nl.s2.p2: Reproduction without prior written authorisation from WeCoop is prohibited.
nl.s3.title: Limitation of Liability
nl.s3.p1: WeCoop is not liable for direct or indirect damages arising from the use of the site.
nl.s4.title: Links to Third-Party Sites
nl.s4.p1: WeCoop is not responsible for the content or privacy practices of linked external sites.
nl.s5.title: Governing Law and Jurisdiction
nl.s5.p1: These Legal Notes are governed by Italian law. Disputes fall under the jurisdiction of the Court of Milan, Italy.
nl.s6.title: Contact
delete_account.hero.title: Delete your account
delete_account.hero.lead: You have the right to request the deletion of your WeCoop account and all associated personal data, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR – Art. 17).
delete_account.info.title: What happens after the request?
delete_account.info.lead: Your request will be processed by our team in compliance with the GDPR. Here is what happens:
delete_account.info.step1.title: Immediate confirmation
delete_account.info.step1.body: You will immediately receive a confirmation email at your registered address.
delete_account.info.step2.title: Processing within 30 days
delete_account.info.step2.body: Our team will process the request within 30 days as required by GDPR Art. 17.
delete_account.info.step3.title: Data deleted
delete_account.info.step3.body: The following will be deleted: account, profile, uploaded documents, messages, preferences and all associated data.
delete_account.info.step4.title: Legal exceptions
delete_account.info.step4.body: Some data may be retained if required by legal or tax obligations (e.g. Stripe transactions).
delete_account.info.privacy_note: For more details on how we process your data, please read our %s.
delete_account.not_logged.title: Log in to continue
delete_account.not_logged.body: You must be logged in to your WeCoop account to request data deletion.
delete_account.not_logged.alt: Don't have an account? Write directly to
delete_account.form.title: Request account deletion
delete_account.form.greeting: You are requesting the deletion of the account: %s
delete_account.form.warning: Warning: this action is irreversible. Once deleted, your account and all associated data cannot be recovered.
delete_account.form.confirm_label: I confirm that I want to permanently and irreversibly delete my WeCoop account and all associated personal data.
delete_account.form.footer_note: The request is protected and processed in accordance with GDPR.
delete_account.sent.title: Request received
delete_account.sent.body: Check your email for confirmation. If you don't receive anything within a few minutes, write to privacy@wecoop.org.
delete_account.status.sent.title: Request sent successfully
delete_account.status.sent.body: We have received your request and you will receive a confirmation email. Our team will process it within 30 days as required by GDPR.
delete_account.status.no_confirm.title: Confirm request
delete_account.status.no_confirm.body: You must check the confirmation box to proceed with the request.
delete_account.status.error.title: An error occurred
delete_account.status.error.body: The request could not be processed. Contact us directly at privacy@wecoop.org.
delete_account.contact.title: Need help?
delete_account.contact.body: If you have questions about deleting your data or prefer to contact us directly, our Privacy team is available to help you.
donations.hero.title: Donate to create concrete opportunities
donations.hero.lead: With your contribution we help citizens, families, young people and international students access services, guidance and inclusion pathways in the local area.
donations.five.title: 5x1000
donations.five.subtitle: Your 5x1000 for WECOOP
donations.five.lead: With your 5x1000 you can concretely support guidance, inclusion and support activities for citizens, families, young people and international students.
donations.five.services_intro: Through WECOOP we develop local and digital services to facilitate access to:
donations.five.cf_intro: Enter our tax code in your income tax return:
donations.free.title: Open donation
donations.free.subtitle: Support the development of WECOOP activities
donations.free.lead: Your donation helps us develop concrete support, inclusion and accompaniment services in the local area.
donations.free.closing: Every contribution helps WECOOP build real and sustainable impact.
